This profile of missing woman Dawn Crey was part of a series of investigative stories published in 2001.

Healthy Eating: Almonds, the favourite super food with a poisonous cousin   Eating sweet almonds is linked to a lower risk of developing obesity, coronary heart disease and cardiovascular disease. Bitter almonds, however, contain glycoside amygdalin — which is poisonous to humans.
